They made sure that after finished, everything was cleaned up around the house.
Thank you Lin roofing hope to use you again in the future.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"W B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWoVnSJ9oo2LIJxdlzx8OSd3zEW7KkVMIAtZa97d1PxeCwJXuSU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First, I want to say I’m super late on this review. It was probably 2019 when I got my roof done in London.  I’m a Toronto native, and I definitely shop for quality and price. I’ve seen my fair share of so called business people trying to pass poor quality work as good stuff, and as well as extreme pricing where they think we are back in the 1980s.

Sorry we aren’t in the 1980s, we have the internet today.

Maggie was the one that gave me a quote after selecting everything I wanted. It was way better than some of the quotes I got. After moving from Toronto to London, I realized it’s less competitive in London so the prices are generally higher, quality is mediocre (check out the restaurants lol). However, Lin Roofing quote is very Toronto in my opinion. You get the quality and prices from Toronto (generally higher quality and lower price).

My neighbor also got his roof done the same year. Almost exact setup from his buddy’s roofing company and they paid more than me. And that’s a “buddy’s discount” lol. I’ve always felt London prices were higher so when I got the quote from Maggie I jumped on it.

I do have to say I am a crazy extensive researcher and bargain hunter. I got quotes from at least 10 companies including my neighbors buddy (which cost more and included less, no underlayment). So usually when I jump on something it’s a good deal for both quality and price.

Needless to say I think they are the Best in London.

About the roof so far, me and the other neighbors that had our roofs done in 2019 think it’s fine. There has been no problems with the shingles  vs that one neighbor that got his roof done by his buddy. His buddy didn’t do it until like Winter, and the shingles are definitely wavy or curly and not flat. I think it froze after they were done and kept that form. I dare not say anything.

Anyways, if you are planning to get your roof done. You should do it ASAP. Inflation is going to continue which means Raw Materials is going to skyrocket at the same time Labor is going to go up with it. We haven’t had High Inflation in 40-years so now that we are entering that era it’s better to get stuff you need done out of the way. The short term rising rates have given an opportunity to do this but at the cost of collapsing the US banks and economy (2023 collapsing banks every single month so far lol). I suspect prices will keep climbing as they return to lower interest rates and QE.

Funny note: My House in Toronto is 100-years old and inside the walls were newspapers. Back then 1 Cent made a huge difference. A pound of roasted pork was 30 cents. 32 cents could get you something. 25 cents could get you something different. Etc.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICxsOmKxAE&fid=0x0:0x81ceeb397119a2"],"When":"2023-5-8"}]

[{"Name":"Kari Barnard","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocICQaFakEm3d38OSW-pym-6cHANiU2c3vbc5oYNyj2W_BXTjw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
I had my roof and eavestroughs replaced by North London Roofing, and the whole experience was excellent from start to finish. Greg was the only person who actually went up on the roof during the estimate, which showed right away how thorough and professional he is. He explained everything clearly, didn’t try to upsell me, and was really easy to work with.

The roof and gutters look fantastic. The crew was organized, respectful of the property, and you can tell they take pride in doing quality work.

What really stood out to me was Greg’s honesty. When my neighbour asked him to take a quick look at his roof, Greg actually went up to assess it before telling him he still had about ten years left before needing a replacement. He could’ve easily said otherwise, but he was completely upfront and ethical. That kind of integrity is rare these days and it speaks volumes about his character.

It’s not easy finding someone you can trust for big home projects, but I’d recommend Greg and his team in a heartbeat.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dan Fallon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVb7WZgGr4E9V_Mlx_mZhaJmBAPa8c7msJ5o2yrY-syVvtnh-A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Started by assisting with the wind damage claim with insurance company. Thank you, North London Roofing, for a fantastic experience!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"missy z","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL04i7QOS0u-c4CR0OmIpmUDaOHdePpBJ1yYD1yfj2A-oD2fA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I’ve contacted this company multiple times with no results. Recently, after a window leak, Mike inspected the issue, took photos, and promised to send someone the next day. No one showed up, and after days of follow-up, I was either ignored or told they were too busy. I had to hire another company to fix the damage.  I received a random text message days after the issue was fixed for a time for someone to come.

Mike also promised to send roof photos from work done with the previous owner, but despite several requests, I never received them. If he can’t send them, he can state that instead of giving me the runaround.

When another window leaked, I reached out again for the photos and a roof inspection. Mike assured me someone would be sent, but once again days later , no follow-up. Messages are ignored.

All communication with Mike has been frustrating, as he fails to follow through on his commitments, leaving you scrambling for alternatives at the last minute. Fortunately, there are other reliable companies in the city—save yourself the headache and look elsewhere.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mitch Seekins","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ4jYwRwIW73X4qZEHTAbzsVFl2ccWfZFo5w19d7yNTTElvIA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had an amazing experience with North London roofing! I received several quotes for the roof replacement. Armour Shield Roofing provided me with one of the quotes that were in the higher range of estimates, but they were able to schedule my roof replacement earlier than other companies, so we went with them.

Their workmanship is excellent.  We had our deck redone in our backyard with composite boards and glass and Armour Shield protected it with tarps and plywood, where other companies said it was not necessary.  They found several vents that were installed improperly in our roof by the builder 20 years ago that had led to several rotten roofing boards and mould.  They cut these out and replaced them with new wood.  We had our roof redone 15 years ago, after a previous storm, and that roofer never mentioned the improper venting that he would have seen.

The roofing team did a great job and cleaned everything up afterwards.  They guarantee their workmanship and product and promised to return if we have any issues at all for 10 years.

I was having issues settling with our insurance company for the damage (never go with TD insurance!!!) and Armour Shield worked with me, delaying payment until we got the issue resolved with the insurance company.  I highly recommend the work done by Armour Shield.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Charlie Squires","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVuaUUxFVxz3uIlQeFFQ-3ybQCyGbN9OjwK8eggLQNmhuNJoLZzZQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The entire experience with Armour Shield Roofing was professional from the start. We booked an appointment from there to get a complete estimate to replace my roof along with styles and types of shingles which I chose, Certainteed Landmark Pro Shingle in the estimate which comes with a great guarantee from the manufacturer. Armour Shield has replaced a few roofs in my neighbourhood. They delivered as promised. Their pricing was not the lowest nor the highest, I try to get the best value for the hard earned dollar. They cleaned up after every day of working on my roof as if they had completed the job. They had lots of protection on and around my flower beds with plywood against the home windows to protect everything. The 8 man crew were very friendly and worked at a steady pace, not rushing doing quality workmanship as opposed to rushing and having to come back and fix things. My experiences with Assaad (General Manager), Rodney (Operations Management), Peter & Rob (site managers) were all top notch…. By that, I mean prompt, courteous, answered every question, and (honestly) nice about it through the entire process. They took their time being meticulous, paying attention to every detail. They even came back after a torrential rainstorm days later and cleaned all my eavestroughs from the fine grit that was washed into them. Full confidence in this company","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Miles Mohr","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWpC8zK22j0-LIo8TVTU0Kq6zKAWwObrBXmLUhHCUpEgnrsfmEumw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had watched Armour Shield Roofing, as well as some other companies, do a number of roofing projects in our community over the last few years and I had been the most impressed by the work that Armour Shield did. From the first meeting with Assaad (the owner) to obtain a quote, he covered everything in detail from the material selection, the warranty, the timeline of the project and what we could expect during the job.

The job was started on a Monday morning in early May and by Friday everything was cleaned up and the dumpster was removed. After each work day, all their materials, ladders and equipment were neatly stored away.

There were a couple of hiccups during the project but Nick (project leader) was on top of them and resolved them to my satisfaction.

After getting multiple quotes from other companies, Armour Shield stood out for their professionalism, workmanship and top-notch customer service.

The crew arrived on time, explained everything clearly, and went above and beyond to ensure the job was done right. They used high-quality materials, kept the worksite spotless and protected our house and gardens. They completed the project quickly without cutting corners and ensured we were completely satisfied with the finished product.

What impressed us most was their attention to detail and genuine care. The crew was respectful, friendly, and clearly took pride in their work. Our new roof looks fantastic and gives us real peace of mind knowing it’s built to last.

If you’re looking for a roofing company that combines craftsmanship, integrity, and reliability, look no further than Armour Shield. Highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sohail Asif","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLJptZESqgIpMD2NIA0W86QfuyuQge3MKmYjSWEjBseU7qwBg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Exceptional Service and Quality Work!

I reached out to Ron right away leaving a couple polite messages before he finally called 2 weeks later. He said he would be out that weekend to take a look and see what was  needed to make the repair. Well ...... no call, no show. Since then I have made several calls and left many more polite message with no reply whatsoever from him as of yet.  The contract I signed with his BBB accredited business Gables Roofing , warrantys their workmanship for a 12 year period. I was hoping Ron could have stood behind this and corrected their installation mistakes so I didn't have to waste my time leaving multiple messages or writing this review but he left me no choice. I hope this has helped others in deciding which company to hire for their next home improvements.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Natsumi Kawasoe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXg5z33mpSHXLxJ109ZADroTnhfXQ6BruxG6ARxduJx0rI3o-Y-=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We asked Gables Roofing Ltd to repair our slate roof which had a minor leak. Instead of focusing on the area where the leak was, the crew replaced slates according to their visual inspection, all over the roof. After their work was done, the roof leaked more. We contacted the company as they guaranteed their work, however, they gave no response for a few weeks. Once Ron came back to look at the roof, he claimed that none of the slate tiles they replaced had shifted or fallen off and there was no issue with their workmanship. He continued further by stating that they can come and replace more slates with additional cost if we wish to. That was irritating to hear after spending just under $8,000. The roof has been leaking off and on since the work done in October 2021. We feel our original request to fix a minor leak and the area of the leak was not focussed on. The roofing crew proceeded to replace slate tiles purely on a cosmetic basis instead of investigating the area with the leak thoroughly. Be careful using this company. If you have a leak in your slate roof, try and pinpoint the area to the company first, or you could end up like us with a similar result.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lorraine Heeney","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLsJhWrgHB_w54dvWixboEyMl1geOrGxnmK84SBhfX7JMjMMg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Ron did a great job in my roof...once all done no mess was left all clean. [{"Name":"Anne Holmes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI28KDqr5aqALLnftHGE1jyfZ62yvqVHxQygXM71wOfIRS2SQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"During a severe storm in May 2025 our home suffered a loss to the roof. We’d previously heard of Advanced Level Homes and quickly reached out to them. Dominic arrived, what seemed to be immediately, to assess the damage. Will followed to introduce the company and explain how the claims process would work. They took numerous pictures of the damage and did an emergency repair. Will brought Rapheal over a couple of days later to reassess the damage. Christine, all I can say is first class service, available at any time for updates by phone, text or email. Rick diligently worked with our insurance company keeping us up to date without us having to deal with them, ensuring our claim was taken care of. During the work process the team of guys working were wonderful. We have a dog who runs in our front and back yard so they cleaned up and used their large magnet tool at the end of each work day ensuring no nails or debris were left behind. It took a bit of time because of negotiating with insurance but we now have a beautiful roof with a 10 year warranty.
Highly recommend this Company!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"inderbir singh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKFYgiz8l_YuDnE4B2W8x6f7LWTYYwaXkn86Zz1Ke4gkjC-7w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had Advanced Level Homes work on my place, and they were amazing! I’m really impressed and grateful for their work. 💯 Highly recommend Advanced Level Homes!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dorel Coacean","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLTGfUjF9f4p_g29YQGNv4m8YWoo8tKnVZWHMZS2TVgcQrFsw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Everything has started when we noticed some damages to the  old roof, couple shingles missing... then, Cam from Advanced Level Homes checked the roof & took lots of pictures ; after, he explained the situation and showed me the damages from the hail, guiding me on next steps.

Christine (customer service) was in touch with us everytime was needed, Rafael came and did the final inspection once the job was done; overall,  the entire team that installed our roof was extremely fast and professional, everybody knew exactly what to do, so it was installed in 2 days !!!
After they finished the installation,  the  place was clean, spotless...
We saved not only a lot of money but -more important - we have peace of mind now.
I would definitely reccomend Advanced Level Homes to anybody that is looking for an amazing job & for peace of mind.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"A Park","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW33AMXlJ4wb6L9NP1EXYGmaInaRXwuSO0UI6LDBXBWWbkYh1QtyA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a great experience working with Advanced Level Homes for my roof. Very happy with the final results and thank you to Rafael, Christine and Cam!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sue Gavin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJF2iE4mg4fUuOkU3ATKZzVksfM6Eut1OpKj6hH-rMw6cWfiw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Like many here, I also experienced hail damage in 2023.  My neighbour recommended Advanced Level Homes, who were excellent from the first time I spoke with them.  I appreciate how they dealt with the insurance company and kept me up to date with any developments.
The job was completed in early September, quickly, neatly and efficiently.  The roof looks great and I am very happy with the results.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jason Harding","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKDnMqGzIjWaPRVIhrqVCfa_prEn82LVC67mBbr3vEWUw-8YQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I just had my roof Completed by Advanced Level Homes.

I was able to get a better roof (better shingles, flashing, vents and underlay then I had) for the cost of my deductible.  I had the old style shingles since my builder didn’t opt for quality.

Anyways, the final date to be able to file a claim (based on the hail storm date) was July 20 of this year, so everyone hussled to get it done.

I know I saved almost 20g , so figure this good of a deal had to be shared, plus I thought the end result was great quality.
I was skeptical at first till I checked out their BBB rating and online reviews.  Then I seen the hail damage evidence and proceeded.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEOvsrPGQ8aXwfQ&fid=0x0:0x96a8054893407058"],"When":"2025-6-9"},{"Name":"Nancy Sarkis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXhsSaXRsB9BH1-R46AO9YCb3rVprKOJooBAm15I75ZGuO-ktXy=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We highly recommend Advanced Level Homes as they did an excellent job replacing our roof. Christine was always available to answer any questions and to provide us with timelines and process.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Paul Stone (Pauliewanna)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW1yjNLAIJWkFRKOD9XMi--aBmSMAJsiEVIgL5G-ewyyzYAwgI=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Advanced did an excellent job advocating for to my insurance and walked me through each step of the process.

The roofing team starting removing tiles at 7 am on the button and thd roof was finished and all scraps were cleaned and put in the trash bin which was placed the day before and taken the day after. They were done before 3 pm.

[{"Name":"Jamie Bere","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLBzIYTUacYAdioGRGQyHBvDGB6hFl0neFFLq8vc5-8s_obstE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We hired this company in November 2022 to fix an attic insulation issue that was causing moisture in our home. They knew about the moisture and told us the insulation had been corrected and the problem resolved.

Later, a home inspection found mold in the attic caused by improper insulation work. We contacted the company, and they returned. During that visit, we were told they sprayed for mold and fixed the insulation. We trusted that their "courtesy" visit had resolved the problem, but the mold issue continued and got worse over time.

When moisture appeared again in colder weather, we hired an independent mold specialist. Their findings were serious. Mold had never been properly remediated. Because of the known moisture, mold would have been present during the original installation, and proper treatment required removing all insulation, which was never done.

Email exchanges with the company were contradictory. At one point, they said it was "highly unlikely" mold was visible during the initial work. They also admitted that if moisture was present, mold could exist but claimed it would not have been present for them, even though we contacted them because of the moisture. They stated they are not a mold remediation company and that the follow-up visit was just a "courtesy" where a growth neutralizer was applied, not actual mold remediation. This directly conflicts with what we were told in person, which was that the mold had been sprayed and addressed. If they truly were not a mold remediation company, they should have referred us to a specialist or advised us to have the attic inspected sooner, but they did neither. Instead, they continued work that did not address the underlying issue we had hired them to fix.

Despite these contradictions, they insisted the work was completed as contracted and refused to take responsibility. They dismissed the independent specialist’s findings and offered no reasons or meaningful resolution.

Because of their refusal to act, we had to pay over $11,000 out of pocket to remove all insulation, properly remediate the mold, and reinstall new insulation.

The lack of accountability and transparency is the most upsetting part. Their explanations changed once the specialist’s findings were presented, yet they continued to deny responsibility. We trusted this company to handle the issue professionally and were left with a worsening mold problem and a major financial burden.

Based on our experience, we cannot recommend this company.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Justin Carnegie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWMHnifPhH_XPRi74flW1mur78AD-u7e9f_2z2STWuH7fCpoA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Started with Ryan coming out - he knows his stuff!  answered my questions, and made his recommendations.  provided a price that i know to be fair.   Carmen then reached out, clarified the details, collected a deposit and unleashed the hounds!  a few weeks later Sam and Dima were out installing new eavestroughs.  Right from the start, the guys were punctual, very courteous, and very friendly.   We moved some vehicles in order to make life easier for everyone, then they got right to work, and got it all done same day.  you would never have know the crew was there other than the fact my old battered eavestroughs have been replaced.  I can't recommend them enough!   Cheers to the AM Group Team!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jenn Harrison","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXkrJI1X-iqGnlaopki6FF9gAEu3cmIVcAxSebvb95FAmv7uOk4=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We have used AM for many projects over the years! They even fixed a door that a different company installed badly (we asked that company to come back many times to fix it- they just couldn’t figure it out), AM came out and had it fixed in one day!
Our most recent project involved, Windows, doors, insulation, siding, garage doors, soffit, fascia, eaves, and tuff deck.  I wouldn’t use any other company for our exterior projects!  The staff is so knowledgeable, thorough, respectful, and kind.  I would definitely recommend to friends and family!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tracey Haynes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXHMEkCF3rWk9FeXfFmV2VehTwhlBNTBJ9XNIxNCsOpoKsBYJ0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The team that we had were wonderful from start to finish. We would highly recommend them for siding, windows and eavestroughs","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICb7-3dxgE&fid=0x0:0xe5d456d1a61a2cfe"],"When":"2024-7-31"},{"Name":"Jin Cha","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUlDRvOvw5H9_CzUGRXt5ENCQ3_p_1u2Biur5g9Tw-VysxvY0w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Please respect owner parking spots...and NOT park in them without permission.  Next time you come to our high rise condo building, use the designated visitor parking spaces.  That's what they are for.  Even if you're thinking, 'Oh, it's only 30 min.'  This is a problem. That could be the time I get home and don't have my space to park my car.  Be respectful and obey simple rules when you're going to other people's homes.  I for one would never trust work to a company who can't be respectful.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Brad Graham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVr4uUCRFGM8wuWUc9TF0v4oycMSVGY4Xy9GCXJJxxzQLHCnoMU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had several quotes from other companies that were quite frankly insanely expensive. I read about AM Windows And Doors online and looked at the reviews. Gave them a call and in a week or so met with Talbot. There was an immediate difference in what Talbot presented at first meeting. Most importantly, no computer, just a measuring tape and a booklet and dressed in work style clothing. We talked about what we wanted in windows, different  options for certain areas and the extent of our window project. He took measurements, wrote some notes down and then left to go back to the office and prepare a quote. Very different from what we had with other sales personnel. No hard sell!
Talbot contacted us a few days later and set up an appointment to go over specifics and prices. Finally the pricing matched our expectations and it was a go. He had some samples to give us a look at what their windows offered and it was a significant difference from the other manufacturers we were introduced to. It was an easy decision.
Matt And Greg, who installed our windows, came by to do final measurements and talk specifics about the job. They answered all of our questions.There were no large problems that could be seen  and Matt and Greg were confident the job would be without issue.
The day of installation arrived and no one showed up in the morning. I got a hold of the head office and there was an issue with a job they had been on the previous day. I understand issues with doing tear out and installations, especially on older homes and was fine with that. However, I was off work at the time and it really didn't matter to me. Had I taken time off work to be there this would've been a big problem. Matt and Greg would be there tomorrow.
The next day Matt and Greg showed up on time and got right to work. They did an amazing job, especially with the window casings. Being an older home it was a challenge and they performed with expert precision. I was very impressed and happy. Our basement windows were a little more work but the results were amazing. Like night and day. The amount of finishing they did to the outside was incredible and was unexpected. Job well done. There was one fly in the ointment unfortunately. On the second day they were installing the front windows. I had asked for a single grill divider across the middle of the three panes of glass on the casement windows. My wife had noticed something was off with the windows in the trailer. I looked at them and sure enough they were wrong. I ran in to alert Matt that the windows were not the design we wanted. Matt read his notes and sure enough it said grill through center. Luckily I also had the schematic drawings that Talbot had produced for the window quote. I showed it to Matt and he took a picture of it and sent it to the person on the phone. The solution was to install the windows as is and come back at a later date to replace the window panels with the proper design. I was fine with that solution.
A few weeks later Mike showed up with our panels and he managed to install all of them by mid afternoon. They looked great, much better than what had been there and what I wanted to begin with. There were no issues replacing them and they've been working just great. Matt never tried to talk us out of what we wanted or gave us any issues with the mistake. He said” If that's what you wanted then we will fix it.” There was never a question of “If” just “How” they would do it.
We have more windows to replace and they will be the company I call! It's not just how they handle the things that go right but how they dealt with the problems that defines a great company. AM Windows and Doors is an exceptionally great company with amazing installers and excellent window engineering and design. Why look any further. I definitely recommend them to anyone interested in an amazing window experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDylYnE1AE&fid=0x0:0xe5d456d1a61a2cfe"],"When":"2021-3-14"},{"Name":"Lance","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKQxRNqXFMS_wRjBsNE5I5TTLKvxP1xkKC-MbBYjWx6tBpvPQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The installers, Brad and Vlad were fantastic. They are skilled and professional. There guys were very friendly - they s/w me before the job, asked if I had any questions or concerns. These men did a great job and cleaned up after them selves - happy with their work ad would not hesitate to have them do more. I highly recommend them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"somebdy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW4Lli00s8L0lpPUlwuEeZLJDF1wQztWabHoSYAjkB_tKvV3sgl=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The team was polite and quick. user_reviews: [{"Name":"Gary McAllister","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJk40JFF_mo6p_-HR0nA37b3nwH6dMavIswrvmqEJpPkbPbdQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"My first call to this company was December 18, 2025.  I was impressed that a roofing professional was sent to my home that day.  He was thorough and diagnosed the issue that was causing the leakage into the house, it was not the roof.  He said he would call after Christmas to set up a visit by a repair crew, and send me a quote.  This was as good as my interactions got, however.\nJanuary 6, 2026, and I texted him on the email with a quote and possible times for work, and I got a \"sorry, your file was in the wrong pile.\"  Subsequent texts were ignored, and I called the office on January 13, when I was assured that someone would call or email a quote and possible times right away.  Nothing.  Called another roofer in the forest city of London and set up a time.  Called again on February 6, and received a call back, but no email, no quote, no date for work.  Meanwhile, the other contractor has attended and fixed the problem, which they correctly diagnosed as well.  It would seem this company just does not want your money; despite my persistence, they resisted all attempts at obtaining my money in exchange for work.  I wasted almost 7 weeks of my time, trying to get them to respond, and I never got a quote or a date for work.  I would not call this company if it was the only one left in town.  They really do not seem to want customers' money, and they act accordingly.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Susan Ratz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKLSPfoK5TXAjIRfUHxnKZJ7cOMJKkFgjkToThlwYPqZOSN2g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I used North London Roofing in May 2024 to replace a piece of fascia that had come off in a wind storm from the front of my house, and also had them install fascia on my outdoor gazebo to protect the wood that was getting weathered.  I was happy with both fixes.  Kurt was very informative in helping advise on a colour for the fascia to match other pieces still in place and older/a bit faded.  I was provided with a quote, and how pricing worked was explained so I could decide on which projects to do.\nAdding the fascia to the gazebo gave it a terrific face lift.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Johnathan Mencl","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJyB4L15gjsjl6OzlOKY3gq8i5lMM0ZxbXLkuFONae8jDlu0w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Andrew Haines","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKpPix_0MyOiR6nLdF8fxzawM4tmTzl8v8bePwvFBNe91PIVA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"5 Stars – Exceptional Service and Consideration

We had the pleasure of living near a Blue Army Construction project, and I can honestly say they went above and beyond in making sure we were comfortable during their work. Construction can often be disruptive, but these guys made a real effort to lessen the impact on us—not because they had to, but because they genuinely cared.

They took it upon themselves to do the right thing, even when it meant going out of their way. That kind of integrity and thoughtfulness is rare. A special shout-out to Kyle, who was absolutely awesome to deal with. He helped us out tremendously and made the whole experience so much easier.

Can’t recommend Blue Army Construction enough—professional, respectful, and truly community-minded.

Thanks Kyle and the team you guys rock 👍","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tracy M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLg6P3EAz2CCvwG4W6QAahSyIBNF4IBLOgmC7kAQ24LxOqdlg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Thank you Blue Army Contractors 👏
I don’t usually leave reviews often  but this company truly deserves it. I didn’t even hire them myself—they were hired by the building I live in—but the experience I’ve had with them has been so positive, I had to share.

Let me start by saying: the building I live in is a nightmare. It looks nice on the outside, but inside it’s the complete opposite—neglected, stressful, and run by people who don’t care. As someone who is currently pregnant, dealing with an unresponsive and careless landlord has been emotionally draining.

Then this construction company came in, and everything changed.

From the very beginning, the team leader—Kyle—stood out. My boyfriend came down angry one day to ask why there had been no notice about the upcoming construction. Kyle didn’t brush us off or act like we were a nuisance. He listened. And the very next day, notices were put up. That alone showed how seriously they take their work and the people around them—even people they weren’t directly working for.

The building, as usual, didn’t prepare properly, but Kyle and his team did everything they could to make the process as smooth as possible. They kept us better informed than our own building management. Kyle even went out of his way to make sure we weren’t blocked in by the work being done around our cars downstairs.

But what really meant the world to me happened after a leak from the garbage room above ended up dripping into the temporary parking spot I was assigned. The ceiling in the lot has been falling apart forever something I’ve emailed about countless times with no response. But Kyle’s team? They stepped up.

Without being asked, they cleaned up the glass and debris, and even wiped down my car, which reeked from the disgusting liquid that had leaked onto it. To some, this might seem like a small act of kindness but to me, it meant everything. As a pregnant woman, I didn’t want to be anywhere near unknown chemicals or substances, and they made sure I didn’t have to be.

In a time when I’ve felt alone and unheard, this company reminded me that good people still exist. Their kindness, honesty, and pride in their work didn’t just fix a mess.they gave me hope.

The work they’re doing looks amazing, and they keep the area well-maintained throughout. I don’t know what their services cost, but based on what I’ve seen, they’re worth every penny and then some.

Thank you, Kyle. Whether you own the company or work for them, you deserve a raise and recognition for how you lead. You and your team made a tough time in my life a little bit brighter just by being decent, hardworking humans. I’ll be recommending your company to anyone and everyone.

Sincerely,
A grateful resident who will never forget your kindness.
Tracy and Andrew","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sophia Cooper","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJverhZVP28JlKCphBMqVRXLLvTmZnHcal4zhdIOEcFs6IXig=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Unfortunately one of the workers who proudly stated he works for this company stated today “he wanted to hit me with his truck” owned by the company because he felt he had the right of way in a RETIREMENT parking lot that had no signs of direction. I’m thankful it wasn’t one of the residents who experienced this.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dean Soufan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLTTvIPf43FyXCy--YzVjYYKAS_ZBIkmWo4wdybUt-LXJuAeA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a great experience working with Vern from Blue Army Contractors regarding a roof leak. He was very attentive, quick to respond, and genuinely willing to help get the issue resolved. Overall, a great guy to deal with.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jamal Abushehada","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIkpco0IYiccCc36E_xNutCYzQLp0NtSGU7ry5rO5OJViHixw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Vern has been amazing to deal with, and he’s been extremely responsive and attentive to all the problems. title: B&T Roofing and Siding
user_reviews: [{"Name":"WO N","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLQ7RHwD8shaKfYVopfPHi1Tt_GB8dP69HqC4K32Ck9lH--4w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Poor supervision of the people doing the work.  Poor quality work as a result.  I have a very simple roof to shingle no crazy angles.  It's took 2 men a week to get it done and it was not done correctly.  Other estimates had been a couple days.   There is a full 8 ft section of my roof where there is an obvious layer missing at the cap.  When compared to the rest of the roof it is at a much steeper angle.  Second there was a large gap left open where I could plainly see the ply wood and underlay.  Worse yet is that I could see the blown insulation from my attic coming through the gap.  If this simple fix was beyond their ability to handle: a they should not be doing roof's and b: they could have told me so I could have dealt with it as opposed to finding it on my own later.  End of the day the initial price was attractive but entirely not worth it.","Images":null,"When":""}]

We are very impressed with their workmanship and the professionalism of the staff. I and the Board Members appreciated the honesty.   I have worked with Jesse and Greg for over 10 years, and they have always been professional and respectful.  The Condo Owners and Board members give Hanenburg a glowing review every time they are on site.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Shelley Brown","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW_uwvF3qpX-NzjMfqetBB4qFJ55AuOC12FzvFv6vsXCkWEEas=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent company from the owner Greg, manager Jesse to all of the crew! They worked very hard - quality workmanship under extreme weather conditions. They work fast & I'm so very happy with my new roof. Tons of compliments already! Greg went above & beyond! Excellent!!  Highly recommend this company!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"jason sutherland","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKt39PzbCTecuIA8YJskN24wBEajR2OumRjeN4PTou7QAvZow=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Jesse was excellent to deal with.  Very patient and not pushy.  Very accommodating.  We had our roof and 3 skylights replace Aug/18.  They were very busy at the time and had a sub-contractor do it. The sub has been installing GAF products for many years and was very knowledgeable and experienced.  It took them 7 days to do but it was a very hot humid week.  The cleanup was spotless when done. We had one skylight that was leaking during a heavy rain before the job was started so Jesse arranged to have it temp. sealed until they could start the job.  I would and have fully recommended Hanenburg for any roofing needs.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Cristian Lagos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUcas0L4xiA8Sg96JepK7d9RNSSMmdyTQn461PchqMO8vQn7rzE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We own a century home that was in serious need of roof repair.  Greg was great at explaining what work was required as well as providing a quote.  We were please to see that the final bill was close to our quote, despite some surprises.  The installation crew were excellent. They were punctual, respectful and very tidy. I would definitely recommend this roofing company, their service and quality is exceptional","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kristian","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocItkD-EZ3jOp8ULQXNtHuiXx2Pwc0psNAxEH2e7OjAwxA8xrg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We are very happy with the work performed from Hanenburg. My roof looks amazing, the owner checked in frequently, the work crew worked hard and had my roof fully finished in 2 days. I'm very happy with the GAF 50 year warranty. Out of 3 different companies we had quote us, Hanenburg was the only one to mention that we didn't have a cap on our fireplace (which is why we were getting birds down our chimney) and they capped it for us when they did the roof. I'm a very indecisive person Jesse took the time to come back when my husband was home and show us samples of the shingles (the only person out of 3 companies to offer this). When I still couldn't decide he offered to get on my roof and show me how it would look up there beside my siding and we were able to choose instantly. I researched all 3 companies and read their worst reviews and when I asked Jesse about Hanenburgs 1 star reviews and read him some he explained the situation immediately, there was no fumbling and answered in a very professional and respectful manner. They installed 3 extra roof vents and 1 bathroom vent for in the future when we decide to put a vent in our bathroom. I also appreciated that on final inspection, Greg told us that they did see some white residue on our shingles, they are sure it will just wash away with the rain but if it becomes problematic in the future that it has been flagged and brought to the attention of GAF. Greg also went around my property and on my roof and did a second clean up just incase the installers missed something which was appreciated as I have 2 young kids who play outside most of the day and often in bare feet. Overall, we are very happy with the sale, the installation and the final inspection. We hope to never need to use the warranty but have piece of mind knowing it's for 50 years. We love our new roof, we're no longer the eye sore in our court with an ugly green roof!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jeanine Cassandro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU11g5GwsH7i_bdM9L738Ya_jY7--gnj0KRTlNCX_ztO5fbmvJf2A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had them install a new roof on an old Victorian home with high peaks. Jesse was very thorough, even checked our ventilation to make sure we weren't loosing heat or air. He actually walked me through the quote and made sure I understood what they could do, and possible issues that could potentially arise. I was very grateful for that, and he was down to earth and very personable and professional.  The crew were hard workers and very respectful.  The one day we had the business open while they worked, they made sure to let me know what side they would be working on, so inside we could be in a different end of the building to ensure a peaceful treatment. I was so impressed.  The roof looked phenomenal and I will continue to refer Hanenburg Roofing to anyone in need of any repair or roofing job. Wish all contractors were like them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ashley Monyard","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWYA3ItLI2y0yTeocAiOOqdBtZSEoXZDXacVpUaWtKadGrWrC-R=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Hanenburg Roofing did the roof on my Westmount home about a year ago. The crew was awesome and they did a great job with the actual installation. The problem came with the post installation service. There was an issue that came up and needed to be resolved and 8 months after bringing it to their attention, the issue is still not resolved. I have tried so many times to get them to take care of this that I really have given them more opportunity than they deserve. If you are looking for a company to do a great installation and also have great post installation service, I am afraid that Hanenburg roofing is not that company. I still hope that they take care of us and if they do I will update my review.

An update to my review. One year later and no attempt by the company to resolve the issue. Continuing to be disappointed 😞","Images":null,"When":""}]

title: Malek Roofing Inc
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Ali Zimmerman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXh24AhPZSEF3HuOlv2asNB3j8N-rORbSaLpErgASat1WRSsQaW=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"⭐☆☆☆☆

Extremely negative experience with Malek Roofing.

While working on my neighbour’s house in August 2024, Malek Roofing damaged my property — breaking a bathroom window and ripping a downspout off the side of my house. I was out of town at the time and was not informed of the damage.

It took nearly three months before the window was repaired, and even after that time I received multiple calls from the window company because Malek Roofing had not paid their invoice. Communication was poor throughout the ordeal, with my calls and texts often going unanswered.

Most concerning: in September 2025, over a year later, the owner, Robert Malek, came to my home uninvited to confront me about a review I had written. I asked him to leave my property. This kind of behaviour is completely unprofessional and intimidating. I also sent a message to his phone letting him know he was not welcome on my property again… and he left a lengthy and aggressive voicemail on my phone in response.

I cannot recommend Malek Roofing. Please consider other contractors for your roofing needs.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB5jBOuRvOuUVlHnzA1hNS7&fid=0x0:0x1f26a219b9e708a2"],"When":"2025-9-27"},{"Name":"Dwayne Carbon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXwhV5QuuRllSF3_e_cH5Hp-YFRfc9xgioWmzi7r9Tk95oAoBM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"","Images":null,"When":""}]

Dean was thorough and helpful throughout the process, and the crew even helped us identify (with photos) the source of a separate roofing issue that we’ll need to address in the future. Communication is excellent--clear, prompt, and professional.  Many thanks to Dean and his team for a great job!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Pia O'Leary","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK1-5Md8MFgFncVMP6jQ3-Q2SN4WUlWBGwuwDuKcXHFq6Ru=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"London Eavestrough and Siding: working all winter, dependable, professional and reasonable.

One week before Christmas I noticed that my 2nd floor eavestrough had become detached from the house. Most eavestrough installers I called were closed for winter. Aluminum Associates, who had originally installed my eavestrough, suggested I call London Eavestrough and Siding.
Right away Dean came out to assess the situation and quoted me 2 solutions: repair (cheaper) or replace. He also reassured me that I could safely wait the 3 weeks before they could come out to work on it.
The workers were very pleasant and professional. By opting for replacement, I now have a leaf-free eavestrough and a larger downspout. The workers tidied everything up and even removed the leaves that were in a 1st floor gutter. I usually have my gutters cleaned but this year the leaves came down with the first snow!

But here’s the icing on the cake. I finally heard back from a different company. They too were closed for the winter but a gentleman gave me a quote over the phone and it was much higher than London Eavestrough and Siding.","Images":null,"When":""}]
